reference: I had a cold a couple of weeks ago that got a little better, but I found I couldn't get my breath properly. I went to the doctor, who said my chest was clear and gave me an inhaler. It's not really helping after two days of using it, and as it's a reliever, I thought I would feel a difference by now.
text: I had a cold a couple of weeks ago that got a little better, but I found I couldn't get my breath properly. I went to the doctor, who said my chest was clear, and gave me an inhaler. It's not really helping after 2 days of using it, and as it's a reliever, I thought I would feel a difference by now.
